content: Research paper "Developing a Contextual Corporate Integrity Measure Using LLMs" received an R&R (Revise & Resubmit) decision from ISF
Started the development of a pet project: <Contextual Thesaurus|projects/contextual-thesaurus.html>
Successfully defended my thesis proposal at the Telfer School of Management, uOttawa. Onward 🚀

Research paper accepted for publication: <Performance measurement through corporate communication|https://doi.org/10.1108/IJPPM-09-2024-0645> in International Journal of Productivity and Performance Management
Assumed responsibility for the <Technology Innovation Club (TIC)|https://linktr.ee/uo_tic?utm_source=linktree_admin_share> @uOttawa
Research paper accepted for publication in <Information Systems Frontiers|https://doi-org.proxy.bib.uottawa.ca/10.1007/s10796-024-10542-6>
Launched a under the guidance of Prof. Shantanu Dutta, focusing on social listening analysis, funded by the SSHRC Partnership Engage Grant
Honoured to be invited as a peer reviewer for Information Systems Frontiers, a peer-reviewed journal published by Springer

Started a research assistantship under Prof. Harshit Rajaiya, engineering structured datasets from large-scale global LinkedIn data and cross-validating them against major industry databases including Crunchbase, PitchBook, and USPTO
